Convert JSON to text and vice versa: JSON converteren naar tekst en vice versa
Use the JSONata language to filter, map,: Gebruik de JSONata taal om complexe JSON payloads te filteren, te kaarten en te transformeren in JavaScript.
Combine an array of JSON objects into a: Combine an array of JSON objects into a single object using a per-field merge strategy.
Map the array or object you want to mani: Maak een kaart van de array of het object dat je wilt manipuleren.
Write a JSONata expression to manipulate: Schrijf een JSONata expressie om je gegevens te bewerken. Je kunt arrays filteren, specifieke velden uitpakken, groepsoffen of de JSON-vorm vervormen. (bijv. $[status="actief"])
An array of JSON objects to merge, e.g. [{"title":"Q1","total":10},{"total":12,"author":"Jane"}]. Map the array output of a previous step here.
How to resolve any field not listed belo: How to resolve any field not listed below. "Last found" mirrors a plain object merge where later objects win.
Override the default strategy for specif: Override the default strategy for specific fields. Each row maps one field name to a strategy.
